a close up of a logo

llm_raw.summary: The image shows the ZONNIC logo on a grey-to-mint gradient background. The logo is present and visually correct, but several critical regulatory elements are missing: there is no bilingual nicotine warning at the top, no 18+ icon, and no risk communication text at the bottom. The logo text is white instead of navy blue, which is not compliant for this background type. Most logo and gradient rules are met, but regulatory and colour application rules are violated. Manual review is needed for font verification and logo safety zone.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement found at the top. Both English and French warnings are missing.
No 18+ age restriction icon found anywhere in the image.
No risk communication text found at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo text found in the image — logo presence confirmed.
Logo text is white on a light grey gradient background. Navy blue is required for this background type.
C halo is present, circular, and sized correctly. No evidence of distortion or incorrect placement.
Logo appears unmodified. No gradients in text, no outlines, no stacking, and no distortion detected.
Background is a grey-to-mint gradient, matching approved flavour palette.
Gradient flows top-to-bottom with dark grey at the top and mint at the bottom. Logo is positioned above the 20% line.
Background matches flavour-led content requirements: uses primary and secondary colours from the flavour palette.
Only approved brand colours (grey, mint, navy blue, white) are used in the image.
Requires manual review — font and weight cannot be fully verified from image signals.
Grey gradient background is used at appropriate opacity and format.
Requires manual review — logo safety zone cannot be fully verified from image signals.
No evidence of halo blending, flavour mismatch, logo in shapes, or other gradient/background violations.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top, including both English and French statements.
violations.evidence: No warning text found at the top of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, risk communication, 18+ icon) are missing from their required positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory text or icons found at top or bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual warning (English and French) is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No English or French warning text found.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ icon is present in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom: 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.'

violations.rule_text: On white or grey gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must be rendered in navy blue (#242c65).
violations.issue: Logo text is white instead of navy blue on a grey gradient background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the logo text colour to navy blue (#242c65) for compliance.
violations.evidence: Logo text is visibly white on grey gradient background.
